← All services Tax & SARS

VAT deregistration

Cancel an existing VAT registration with SARS.

R2 875 incl. VAT Typical turnaround: Minimum 21 working days (often longer)
More about this service ▾

VAT deregistration is a document-heavy SARS process. SARS requires extensive supporting documentation and the case almost always needs repeated follow-up before it is finalised. The minimum turnaround is 21 working days, but in practice it frequently takes considerably longer. We handle the paperwork and keep following up with SARS on your behalf until the deregistration is confirmed.

Secure payment handled by PayFast. Choosing “Pay later” sends us your request and we’ll invoice you.

Accountants & business advisors — cloud accounting, tax, payroll and advisory for South African business owners.

SAIPA Professional Accountants (SA) · Serving clients across South Africa
